calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Real Property
Off Calendar May-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Geroge Weinkauf for Anthony Rodin.

Mr. Weinkauf stated that a supplement was filed by Anthony on March 29, 2011 and that a joinder was filed by the Sister on May 6, 2011. In addition, Mr. Weinkauf stated that the property was an undeveloped lot in South Lake Tahoe, that there was an agreement between the Beneficiaries/Co-Successor Trustees (Brother and Sister) that the lot would go to Anthony Rodin. Mr. Weinkauf also explained his relationship with the Settlors, spoke of the Settlor's 50 year connection to San Francisco, stated that all of the records go to the home in San Francisco and that the Daughter administers the Trust from the home. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.

Petition For Order Determining Title To Real Property
